metadata.description: Checks and balances triggered for cost structure and pricing benchmark analysis
metadata.focus: Monitor variable cost ratios, pricing power, supplier concentration, and cost leakage relative to industry benchmarks

universal_controls.title: Variable Cost Ratio Monitoring
universal_controls.description: Track direct materials, direct labor, and variable general & administrative as percentage of revenue monthly. Flag any month-over-month increase more than 2% against benchmark.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Monthly variable cost ledger + benchmark comparison report

universal_controls.title: Supplier Concentration Risk Assessment
universal_controls.description: Ensure no single supplier represents >30% of cost of sales. Identify backup suppliers and document dual-source agreements for critical inputs.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Supplier spend concentration report + backup vendor agreements

universal_controls.title: Pricing Power & Elasticity Testing
universal_controls.description: Test price adjustments on a subset of customers/products quarterly. Measure volume sensitivity and margin retention to validate pricing strategy.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Price test design + elasticity measurement results

universal_controls.title: Cost Leakage & Phantom Expense Audit
universal_controls.description: Review accruals, prepaid amortization, and intercompany allocations for misclassification. Ensure fixed costs aren't bleeding into variable cost lines.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Cost center reconciliation + allocation theory and planning documentation

controls.title: Bill of Materials Variance Control
controls.description: Compare actual material usage vs. standard BOM per production run. Investigate variances >5% for waste, theft, or specification drift.
controls.audit_trail: BOM variance report + root cause analysis log

controls.title: Scrap & Rework Cost Tracking
controls.description: Tag and track all scrap and rework costs by workstation. Target <2% of total production cost; escalate if trending above benchmark.
controls.audit_trail: Scrap register by workstation + rework labor hour logs

controls.title: Shrinkage & Inventory Loss Monitoring
controls.description: Perform cycle counts weekly for high-value SKUs. Compare Point-of-Sale (POS) sales to inventory depletion; flag discrepancies >1.5% for investigation.
controls.audit_trail: Cycle count sheets + shrinkage investigation reports

controls.title: Markdown & Promotional Cost Analysis
controls.description: Track gross margin impact of all markdowns and promotions. Ensure promotional lifts justify margin sacrifice vs. baseline sales.
controls.audit_trail: Promotion P&L by campaign + lift analysis report

controls.title: Utilization & Realization Rate Tracking
controls.description: Monitor billable hours vs. total hours (utilization) and collected revenue vs. billed revenue (realization). Target both >75% for margin health.
controls.audit_trail: Weekly utilization dashboard + realization aging report

controls.title: Scope Creep & Fixed-Fee Margin Protection
controls.description: For fixed-fee engagements, track actual hours vs. budgeted hours weekly. Require change order approval if variance exceeds 10%.
controls.audit_trail: Engagement burn report + change order log

controls.title: Food Cost Percentage & Portion Control
controls.description: Calculate food cost as % of menu item revenue weekly. Standardize recipes with exact portions; audit plate waste and comp tickets.
controls.audit_trail: Recipe cost cards + weekly food cost P&L by category

controls.title: Labor Cost Scheduling Optimization
controls.description: Match labor schedules to forecasted covers/revenue. Target labor cost <30% of revenue; flag overtime >5% of total labor hours.
controls.audit_trail: Schedule vs. actual labor report + overtime justification log

controls.title: Ingredient Commodity Hedge Review
controls.description: Flour, sugar, and oil represent >50% of cost of sales. Monitor commodity futures and evaluate forward contracts or hedging to stabilize input costs.
controls.audit_trail: Commodity price tracker + hedge position register

controls.title: Yield & Batch Consistency Audit
controls.description: Track actual output vs. theoretical yield per batch. Inconsistent yields signal recipe drift, scaling errors, or spoilage.
controls.audit_trail: Batch yield log + theoretical vs. actual reconciliation

controls.title: Component Obsolescence & EOL Cost Management
controls.description: Semiconductor and component EOL cycles are rapid. Monitor supplier EOL notices and maintain last-time-buy budgets to avoid premium spot-market costs.
controls.audit_trail: EOL notice tracker + last-time-buy authorization log

5412.title: Accounting, Tax Preparation, Bookkeeping, and Payroll Services

controls.title: Client Acquisition Cost vs. Lifetime Value Analysis
controls.description: Track marketing, sales, and onboarding hours per new client. Ensure CAC is recovered within 12 months via recurring revenue.
controls.audit_trail: CAC by channel + client lifetime value cohort report

controls.title: Cost Per Available Room (CPAR) Benchmarking
controls.description: Track housekeeping, maintenance, and utilities cost per available room. Compare to STR reports for same-scale competitors.
controls.audit_trail: Monthly CPAR calculation + STR competitive set comparison
